author: Chris Nkuno
name: Non-Record: 11L + XSA4 H100 Legal Frontier (1.4612 BPB)
blurb: Single-H100 non-record submission using an 11-layer decoder-only transformer with XSA in the final 4 layers. The official result is the best legal post-quant checkpoint from a 25-step frontier: 1.4612 BPB at 15,983,603 total bytes.
